en.title: DevOps Engineering Foundation
en.text: Completed structured training in DevOps workflows including CI/CD, containerization, cloud deployment practices, and release lifecycle fundamentals.

en.title: AWS Cloud Practitioner Essentials
en.text: Validated core AWS cloud concepts including architecture, security, billing fundamentals, and service selection for real-world workloads.

links.href: documents/Rajeev kumar_Fundamentals of Agile Methodology with DevOps Integration.pdf

en.title: Fundamentals of Agile Methodology with DevOps Integration
en.text: Completed training on Agile delivery models integrated with DevOps practices to improve collaboration, release speed, and deployment quality.

en.title: Primary Cloud DevOps Ownership in Startup Team
en.text: Led end-to-end DevOps and cloud responsibilities in a small product team, covering CI/CD, cloud deployments, release reliability, and operational support.

en.title: Delivered Impactful Cloud/DevOps Project Outcomes
en.text: Achieved measurable project outcomes including up to 80% reduction in manual provisioning effort, 40% container image optimization, and zero-downtime deployment pipelines.

en.title: Bronze/Gold Medal – DevOps & AWS
en.text: Recognized for outstanding performance in AWS and DevOps-focused training, demonstrating strong execution across cloud and automation competencies.
